description: Immutable official Mozambique scope used by RuleSpec-MZ: the MOZMOD v3.1 tranche-1 statute chain (Lei 4/2007 Lei da Proteccao Social behind the INSS contribution split; Lei 20/2013 operative IRPS revision; Lei 5/2009 creating the ISPC simplified small-taxpayer tax, sliced from the Boletim da Republica 2009-01-12 I Serie 3. Suplemento gazette; Lei 3/2012 operative IVA revision). First Mozambique cut; SOUTHMOD full-bundle program lane 5.
